summary: Iteration 13 end-to-end testing of (1) Ad Analytics + CSV export, (2) cache-busted logo, (3) AdRail scroll-with-page + mobile inline + 10:7 aspect + gap-12, (4) site Footer + 6 static pages. Backend: 13/13 NEW iter13 tests passed (test_iter13_ad_analytics.py) plus 66/66 pre-existing iter9+iter10+iter11+iter12 tests still pass — zero regressions. Frontend: Logo confirmed using /gomofos-crest.png?v=3 (200 OK); Footer with all 6 links (footer-about/careers/support/contact/terms/privacy) renders on Dashboard, LandingPage, and every /about /careers /support /contact /terms /privacy public route (each carries the right *-page data-testid); AdRail renders on desktop xl viewport with xl:absolute xl:right-6 and 3 ad-slot-0..2; scroll test confirmed rail moves 1:1 with page scroll (204px page scroll = 204px rail Y delta) i.e. NOT fixed; on 414×800 mobile viewport AdRail is computed `position: static` (inline) and ad-slot-0 visible after scroll; ad image aspect ratio 10:7 verified in component code; gap-12 between slots verified. /admin/ads/analytics page: 4 KPI cards (total-impressions/clicks/ctr + ACTIVE count), window selector 1D/7D/30D switches actually refetch data (impressions went from 4@7d to 6@30d), export-csv button present, row-{ad_id} renders for created ad, back-to-ads link works, open-analytics button on /admin/ads navigates correctly; non-admin (davidjovanic) redirected to /dashboard. CSV export verified: text/csv MIME, attachment Content-Disposition, header row with 'Ad ID' and 'Impressions (7d)', TOTAL row at end, contains created ad ID. Ad-event logging: impression creates ad_events row with kind='impression' + expires_at ~90d (verified delta=85<d<95); click creates ad_events row + 302 redirect + click counter increments; INACTIVE ad guard: impression POST returns 200 but counter stays 0 AND no ad_events row logged. Ad-manager access: davidjovanic promoted via /admin/ad-managers then can GET /admin/ads/analytics (200) — confirms _require_ad_admin gate works for both admin and ad-manager. Page content does NOT overlap AdRail — Dashboard screenshot at 1920×900 shows content column ends well before the ad column (ProtectedRoute xl:pr-[200px] reserve).

minor.issue: Endpoint returns 200 even when matched_count=0 (silent no-op). Functionally correct (no counter/event), but a 404 or {ok:false,reason:'inactive'} would be more honest for client telemetry/debugging.
Streams synchronously via iter([buf.getvalue()]) — fine at current volume (1000 ads ceiling) but if volume grows, consider chunked streaming to avoid loading the whole CSV into memory.

issues: Window selector buttons (1D/7D/30D) and Export CSV are visually grouped without a label; consider an aria-label='analytics-window' on the wrapping container for screen readers.

max-w-md (28rem) on mobile means cards span almost full width — works, but slot-2 may still be below the fold on very short pages. Acceptable for sponsored placement; ad-slot-0 confirmed visible after scrollTo(bottom).

action_items: (NICE-TO-HAVE) Return a non-200 response when /api/ads/{id}/impression is fired against an inactive ad so clients can detect a stale rotation cache.
(NICE-TO-HAVE) Add aria-labels to the analytics window selector group for accessibility.

(VERIFIED, no action) Ensure TTL index on ad_events.expires_at is live in production — code path inserts the field, but the index itself was added in server.py and should be confirmed on the live cluster (per iter12 same pattern).
critical_code_review_comments: routers/ads.py L256-299 ads_analytics: solid — 1..365 day validation, single aggregation pipeline, sort-by-window-impressions. Per-ad rows correctly merge counter totals with window totals. _ctr helper guards divide-by-zero.

routers/ads.py L302-334 ads_analytics_csv: clean — reuses ads_analytics so the CSV and JSON can never diverge. Includes header, per-row, blank-line separator, TOTAL row. Filename embeds window + date for filing.
routers/ads.py L74 inactive-ad guard: `update_one({'id': ad_id, 'active': True})` correctly prevents inflating counters for paused ads. Verified by test.

AdRail.js: removed fixed positioning correctly — xl:absolute requires the parent in ProtectedRoute to be position:relative which is the case. Mobile layout uses default (static) flow. 10:7 aspectRatio + gap-12 match spec. Impression-once-per-session ref guard still prevents inflation on rotation.
Footer.js: clean 45-line component, dynamic year, 6 testid'd links. Render once per protected page + landing — no duplication issues observed.

AdminAdAnalytics.js: window selector triggers useEffect via [canAccess, days]; CSV export uses window.open(url, '_blank') so the browser handles the download with the cookie session — appropriate. data-testid coverage is comprehensive (KPI cards, window-{d}, export-csv, row-{id}, no-rows, back-to-ads).

Logo.js: cache-bust via `?v=3` is the right move — both filename change and query-string change invalidate Cloudfront/Cloudflare edge caches. Document recommends bumping the version on every crest update; consider a build-time constant if/when crest changes get frequent.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iter13_ad_analytics.py (NEW, 13 tests covering ad_events logging, inactive guard, analytics JSON+CSV, ad-manager access, backwards-compat smoke)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (logo cache-bust, footer on all routes, 6 static pages, AdRail desktop scroll-with-page, AdRail mobile inline, analytics page KPI+window+export+rows+redirect, /admin/ads VIEW ANALYTICS nav, no content overlap)

test_credentials: admin@esportsbet.com / admin123; davidjovanic@yahoo.com.au / Andmay123 (per /app/memory/test_credentials.md and iter12).
seed_data_creation: Created ephemeral ads (TEST_iter13_*, TEST_UI_rail, TEST_UI_rail2) in tests + browser session; ALL cleaned up at end of suite/test. davidjovanic briefly promoted to ad-manager during test_ad_manager_can_access then revoked. ad_events rows created during testing carry expires_at ~90d and will auto-expire via TTL.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter13 baseline = 13/13 iter13 + 66/66 backwards-compat. Regression entry-points: /app/backend/tests/test_iter13_ad_analytics.py. Use admin session for /admin/ads/analytics (also accepts ad-manager role). To create displayable AdRail content the test must POST /api/admin/ads with active=true. AdRail visible at >=1280px on desktop via xl:absolute and on all sizes inline below content. Footer mounts on every ProtectedRoute child and LandingPage. Static routes /about /careers /support /contact /terms /privacy are PUBLIC (no auth required). CSV export at /api/admin/ads/analytics/export returns text/csv — verify with raw HTTP (requests), not Playwright (would trigger file download dialog). Backend URL: https://bet-esports.preview.emergentagent.com. Auth via HttpOnly cookie sessions.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. One initial test assertion (rail scroll > 300px) was tuned to >=1:1 ratio after observing the test page only scrolls 204px (short content). Confirmed page-scroll-Δ == rail-y-Δ (both 204px) which proves rail uses document-relative absolute positioning (the fix the user wanted) — was NOT a code bug.
